data.title: Encryption Standards
data.description: Netflix uses advanced encryption to protect user data both at rest and in transit.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 and TLS 1.2 with strong cipher suites.

data.title: Security Incident Response
data.description: A dedicated team and protocol for responding to security incidents.
data.technical_spec: Automated alert mechanisms and incident management playbooks.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Regular vulnerability scanning and patch management protocols.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes both commercial tools and in-house systems for scanning.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation
data.description: Strategies in place to protect against DDoS attacks on streaming services.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes AWS Shield and edge server CDN enhancements.

data.title: Authentication and Authorization
data.description: Strong user authentication mechanisms to safeguard account access.
